missingFromExtract.liveSectionDescription: Hero tag/eyebrow above title: 'Pour les RTE, PMO SAFe et équipes agiles à l'échelle'
Hero interactive tabs showcasing 6 product views (Portfolio, Quarter plan, Capacitaire, Priorisation, Roadmap, Reporting) with Lottie animations
Comparison table subtitle 'Le quotidien du RTE transformé.'
CTA section has two cards (Réserver une démo + Découvrir la vidéo) with descriptions, not just two links

sections.note: Missing eyebrow tag 'Pour les RTE, PMO SAFe et équipes agiles à l'échelle' and the interactive tabs/Lottie product showcase.
Missing subtitle 'Le quotidien du RTE transformé.'
Item labels combine product name + description; on live they are separated as h3 + p, but content faithfully reproduced.

Live has two CTA cards each with own heading + description (Réserver une démo / Découvrir vidéo). Extraction collapses to single CTA + videoHref, losing the second card's heading and description text.

audit.summary: Extraction is largely faithful: all main feature-split sections, stats, pain-points, comparison rows, FAQ, testimonial and trust badge are correctly captured with canonical fields. Main gaps: (1) hero is missing the eyebrow tag and the interactive product-tabs/Lottie showcase below the headline; (2) comparison table missing its subtitle; (3) the final CTA section is reduced to a single CTA when live shows two parallel CTA cards with their own descriptions.
